_doctrine: Canonical scan doctrine lives in Config/low-noise-policy.json (keyports_cybernet_json) and Config/cybernet-naabu-profiles.json (windows_selected alias). This profile mirrors that port set and CDN-exclude posture for legacy PowerShell handoff string generation only; PowerShell never executes scans. PowerShell is deprecated for Northwell-targeted workflows; Bash-first AD-export pipelines remain the Northwell-forward path.
